name: get_page
description: Reads one page (diagram) from a local .drawio file and returns its raw mxGraphModel XML, decompressing it first if the file stores that page compressed. Use list_pages first to find the index, name, or id of the page you need.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the local file. Must end in .drawio or .xml.

page.description: Which page to read: a zero-based page index (e.g. "0"), the page's exact name, or the page's id as shown by list_pages.
